deviations: The full app suite still does not pass on this branch. During the required rerun it reported multiple unrelated failures outside the video-editor refactor surface, including `src/shared/hooks/segments/__tests__/segmentOutputsQueries.test.ts`, `src/tools/character-animate/lib/__tests__/characterAnimate.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskCancellation.test.ts`, `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/SegmentSettingsForm/components/__tests__/StructureVideoSection.test.tsx`, `src/shared/lib/tasks/__tests__/taskParamContract.test.ts`, `src/app/routes.test.tsx`, `src/domains/generation/hooks/__tests__/useGenerationMutations.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/segments/__tests__/useSegmentMutations.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/segments/__tests__/useSegmentSettings.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/usePersistentToolState.test.ts`, `src/shared/lib/__tests__/taskCreation.test.ts`, `src/shared/lib/tasks/imageEditing/__tests__/imageInpaint.test.ts`, `src/integrations/supabase/repositories/generationMutationsRepository.test.ts`, and `src/test/systemLogger.test.ts`.

The hook-hierarchy criterion is still not literally satisfied. `useTimelineState` imports and calls `useTimelineSave` rather than composing `useTimelineCommit`, `useTimelinePersistence`, and `usePollSync` directly.

The final verification task is a validation gate rather than a single concrete bugfix, so there is no one exact defect to isolate in a short standalone reproduction script; the verification was performed through the required full-suite and structural checks instead.

The structural checks confirm `useTimelineSave.ts` is a thin 87-line composer, `useTimelineData.ts` is deleted, the old edit-path symbols are gone, and the Editor/Chrome/Playback context split remains.
